description: A designed White House 'headline roundup' graphic crediting the President. The background is a dimmed/darkened photograph of an airport terminal showing TSA security checkpoint stanchions, signage, and travelers, with a 'STEP' / 'Slip-ins' advertisement visible across the top. Centered near the top is the small white line-art White House emblem above the engraved-style serif label 'The WHITE HOUSE,' followed by a large white serif all-caps headline 'THANK YOU, POTUS.' Below are four white torn-paper/ripped-edge banner strips, each carrying a news outlet logo and a real headline: CNN US ('Airport wait times plummet from hours to minutes as TSA workers start getting back pay'); The Times-Picayune / nola.com ('Shorter wait times reported at New Orleans airport six weeks into government shutdown'); AP ('Airport bottlenecks ease as TSA workers get paid, but shutdown continues'); and CBS NEWS ('TSA wait times at BWI improve Monday after chaotic weekend'). The composition stacks third-party media headlines as social proof. The propaganda technique uses curated mainstream-news quotes to credit President Trump (per the tweet, framing the event as 'the Democrat DHS Shutdown' that Trump resolved by getting TSA officers paid), targeting a general audience to validate the administration's narrative with seemingly neutral sources.
notable_text: THANK YOU, POTUS | Airport wait times plummet from hours to minutes as TSA workers start getting back pay | Shorter wait times reported at New Orleans airport six weeks into government shutdown | Airport bottlenecks ease as TSA workers get paid, but shutdown continues | TSA wait times at BWI improve Monday after chaotic weekend
